key.name: show-hostname
key.summary: Show computer name in the panel label
key.description: When enabled, the panel label appends the local hostname after the account name.

key.name: show-username
key.summary: Show display name in the panel label
key.description: When enabled, the top bar shows the account real/display name next to the avatar and optional hostname.

key.name: show-avatar
key.summary: Show avatar in the top bar
key.description: When enabled, the top bar shows the user avatar before the account name.

key.name: keep-awake
key.description: When enabled, the extension inhibits session idle so the screen saver does not activate.

key.name: keep-awake-fullscreen
key.description: When enabled, inhibit idle while the focused app is fullscreen.

key.name: keep-awake-media
key.summary: Keep awake while media is playing
key.description: When enabled, inhibit idle while an MPRIS media player reports playback.

key.name: keep-awake-timer-active
key.description: When enabled, inhibit idle until the selected timer duration expires.

key.name: keep-awake-timer-minutes
key.description: Number of minutes used when the keep-awake timer is started.

key.name: keep-awake-timer-deadline
key.description: Wall-clock deadline in microseconds. This internal state lets an active timer retain its original expiry across Shell reloads.

key.name: place-after-navigation
key.description: When enabled, the panel item is placed after the Apps and Places menus if they are loaded.

key.name: show-topbar
key.summary: Show the extension in the top bar
key.description: When disabled, the quick settings menu entry remains available but the panel item is hidden.

key.name: show-quick-settings
key.summary: Show the extension in the quick settings menu
key.description: When disabled, the right-side quick settings toggle is hidden.

key.name: quick-settings-toggle-topbar-only
key.description: Compatibility key retained so an older cached extension module can finish unloading safely after an update. Current versions do not read or modify this setting.

key.name: touchpad-previous-map
key.description: Internal value used to restore the mapping that existed before enabling the middle-click convenience toggle.

key.name: hide-topbar-fullscreen
key.summary: Hide the top bar while an app is fullscreen
key.description: When enabled, the GNOME top bar is hidden whenever the focused window is fullscreen.

key.name: hide-topbar-fullscreen-all-monitors
key.summary: Apply fullscreen autohide on all monitors
key.description: When enabled, a focused fullscreen window on any monitor can hide the GNOME top bar. When disabled, fullscreen autohide only applies to the primary monitor.

key.name: hide-topbar-maximized
key.summary: Hide the top bar while the focused app is maximized
key.description: When enabled, the GNOME top bar is hidden whenever the focused window is maximized.

key.name: hide-topbar-touching
key.summary: Hide the top bar while the focused app touches the top edge
key.description: When enabled, the GNOME top bar is hidden whenever the focused window reaches the top edge of the screen.

key.name: loads-position
key.description: Controls whether system load columns are shown on the left side of the top bar or before the right-side system icons.

key.name: loads-refresh-seconds
key.description: Number of seconds between CPU, memory, swap, and GPU usage updates.

key.name: metrics-refresh-seconds
key.description: Legacy combined polling interval kept for compatibility with older versions. New versions use separate usage and temperature intervals.

key.name: temps-refresh-seconds
key.description: Number of seconds between CPU and GPU temperature updates.

key.name: show-load-cpu
key.description: When enabled, show CPU usage as a top-bar column.

key.name: show-load-mem
key.description: When enabled, show memory usage as a top-bar column.

key.name: show-load-swap
key.description: When enabled, show swap usage as a top-bar column.

key.name: show-load-igpu
key.description: When enabled, show integrated GPU usage when the driver exposes it.

key.name: show-load-dgpu
key.description: When enabled, show discrete GPU usage when the driver exposes it.

key.name: show-load-network
key.description: When enabled, show aggregate non-loopback network receive throughput and details.

key.name: network-interface
key.description: Interface used for throughput, or auto to aggregate physical interfaces.

key.name: show-load-disk
key.description: When enabled, show aggregate physical disk read activity and details.

key.name: metric-order
key.description: Comma-separated identifiers controlling usage metric order.

key.name: igpu-device
key.description: DRM card identifier selected for integrated GPU metrics, or auto.

key.name: dgpu-device
key.description: DRM card identifier selected for discrete GPU metrics, or auto.

key.name: nvidia-index
key.description: Zero-based nvidia-smi GPU index used for discrete metrics on multi-GPU systems.

key.name: use-load-colors
key.description: When enabled, usage icons and columns use per-metric colors. When disabled, they use the default white panel color.

key.name: temps-position
key.description: Controls whether temperature columns are shown after the load columns on the left side or before the load columns on the right side.

key.name: temp-order
key.description: Comma-separated identifiers controlling temperature metric order.

key.name: temperature-unit
key.description: Controls whether temperatures are displayed in Celsius or Fahrenheit.

key.name: temperature-decimals
key.description: When enabled, temperatures are displayed with one decimal place.

key.name: show-temp-cpu
key.description: When enabled, show CPU temperature in the configured unit when available.

key.name: show-temp-igpu
key.description: When enabled, show integrated GPU temperature in the configured unit when available.

key.name: show-temp-dgpu
key.description: When enabled, show discrete GPU temperature in the configured unit when available.

key.name: use-temp-colors
key.description: When enabled, temperature icons and values use green, yellow, orange, and red threshold colors. When disabled, they use the default white panel color.

key.name: temp-warning
key.description: Temperature in Celsius where metrics change to the warning color.

key.name: temp-critical
key.description: Temperature in Celsius where metrics change to the critical color.

key.name: metrics-click-action
key.description: Open GNOME System Monitor when a metric is clicked, or do nothing.

key.name: pause-metrics-when-locked
key.description: Skip hardware polling while the session is locked.

key.name: adaptive-refresh-on-battery
key.description: Multiply polling intervals while UPower reports that the computer is on battery.

key.name: battery-refresh-multiplier
key.description: Multiplier applied to metric intervals while on battery.
